# COMET Change Proposal (CCP)

> A CCP documents a significant change to the standard so the reasoning is
> captured for the Standards Committee and for future readers. Use it for new
> fields, required/type changes, or anything affecting backward compatibility.
> Trivial fixes (typos, wording) don't need a full CCP — just open an issue.

**CCP title:**
**Author(s):**
**Date:**
**Status:** Draft | Under discussion | Accepted | Declined | Deferred
**Target version:** _e.g. 1.2.0_

## 1. Summary

One or two sentences describing the change.

## 2. Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected (publishers, distributors,
retailers, software vendors)? What does the standard fail to capture today?
Real-world examples are welcome.

## 3. Proposed change

Be specific. Include the exact fields or picklist values affected.

- **Field(s):** name, tier (essential/core/extended), owner, type, required?, length
- **Picklist(s):** list name and values added/changed/removed
- **Documentation:** any guide sections to update

## 4. Version impact

Which version bump does this require, per GOVERNANCE.md?

- [ ] PATCH — new optional field, new picklist value, or clarification
- [ ] MINOR — a field becomes required, or a type changes, or a new required field
- [ ] MAJOR — a field is removed, or this is part of the annual revision

## 5. Backward compatibility

How does this affect existing COMET files and implementations? Is a migration
path needed? Can old files still validate?

## 6. Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why they were not chosen.

## 7. Open questions

Anything still unresolved for the Committee to weigh in on.
